titleStmt.title: SII 24.214: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 214. (A.R. No. 45 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of the land referred to in Nos. 212 and 213 above having been made tax-free by Valaivīśuvāṉ Periyaperumāḷ Kāliṅgarāyar of Kaṭṭikkuṟichchi, a hamlet of Parāntakanallūr in Naḍuvil-kūṟṟam, a subdivision of Miḻalai-kūṟṟam in Pāṇḍimaṇḍalam, to the bhaṭṭas of Kaliyugarāmachaturvēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉerimel koṇṭāṉ pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu miḻalaikkūṟṟattu(ṭṭu) naṭuvilk kūṟṟattu śrīparāṉtakaṉallūr kaṭṭikkuṟicci Uṭai yāṉ valaivīcuvāṉ periyaperumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyar perumāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam vikramacoḻa ccaturvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār pakkal vilaikoṇṭu namperāl vaitta kaliyukarāmac caruppetimaṅkalattup paṭṭakaḷukku taṅkaḷukkuk kuṭiiruppukkum vāstuvukkum vaḻikkum nāṭṭupperuvaḻiyāy Ivakarattu Ivvāstuvukku
Uṭpaṭṭa malaikku parivattaṉaiyākavum vilaikoṇṭa puṉcey kuḻi toḷāyirattu Aimpa tukkum nirnilaṅkuḻi nūṟṟāṟekālukkum Itukkuṭpaṭṭa teṅku mā Uḷḷiṭṭa pala maraṅkaḷukkum kaṭamai poṉvari Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittupātikkum tevaikkum vikrama coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu kuṭuttup poṉta viḻukkāṭu pattāvatu pacāṉa mutalukku nūṟṟumuppattuṉālu paṇamum payaṟu nāḻi Uṭpaṭa Irupatiṅkalaṉellum variyilum puravilum kaḻittu perumāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ koyilk kaṇakkilum kaḻikkac coṉṉom . Ippaṭikku Ivvolai
piṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu candrātittavaraiyum cellumpaṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭi vittuk koṇṭaṉupavittup potuka . Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṭavallattirukkai Iḷāṉ kuṭiyāṉa Indrāvatāranallūr Āṭkoṇṭāṉ nārāyaṇatevaṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu vaṭatalaiccempi nāṭṭu koṭuma ḷūrāṉa Uttamapāṇṭinallūr Araiyaṉ cokkanāyaṉāṉa kulacekarakkāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 24.214 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
